summary: Great‑sounding recording that captures a solid performance, regarded as the best available source for this show.
review: Both reviewers praise the audio quality, calling it the best sounding version of the available tapes and noting the venue sounded very good. The concert itself is described as a fine, quite good show, making the release enjoyable both sonically and musically.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews highlight excellent sound quality and a good performance, yielding an overall rating of four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the best sounding among available sources; great clarity and venue acoustics, with no reported flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Performance noted as quite good throughout, with no specific issues mentioned.
